description_long: This is a modern, rectangular pendant lamp designed to be suspended from the ceiling by four thin cables attached to each corner. The lamp features a sleek, minimalist frame with a hollow center, likely housing integrated LED lighting along the inner edges. The frame appears to be made of metal with a smooth, matte finish, giving it a contemporary and industrial look. The cables are thin and unobtrusive, emphasizing the floating effect of the lamp. The top mounting plate is flush and simple, matching the overall aesthetic. This lamp is ideal for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or upscale public spaces.
description: A sleek, rectangular pendant lamp with a minimalist metal frame suspended by four thin cables from a ceiling mount. The design is modern and unobtrusive, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame and the two front suspension cables.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the frame and the depth of the lamp.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, showing the back edge of the frame and rear cables.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and depth from the other side.
